task_completion.description: Import the clothing inventory into Copper Point of Sale
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Copper Point of Sale application window should be visible, showing the imported clothing items (e.g., Floral White Top, Striped Silk Blouse) in its Items or Inventory list.

task_completion.description: Apply a 20% discount to overstocked items (quantity >= 30)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Copper POS or the final exported CSV, items with quantity >= 30 should have their prices reduced by 20%. Look for 'Floral White Top' priced at $60.00 (originally $75.00) or 'Striped Silk Blouse' priced at $40.00 (originally $50.00).

task_completion.description: Apply a 15% markup to low-stock items (quantity <= 7)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Copper POS or the final exported CSV, items with quantity <= 7 should have their prices increased by 15%. Look for 'Ocean Blue Shirt' priced at $57.50 (originally $50.00) or 'Silk Summer Top' priced at $80.50 (originally $70.00).

task_completion.description: Export the updated inventory to clearance_inventory.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'clearance_inventory.csv' should be visible on the Desktop or in a file explorer, or there should be an export dialog/success message in Copper POS saving to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\clearance_inventory.csv'.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with the Copper Point of Sale application to import and manage the inventory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Copper Point of Sale GUI being used, rather than just terminal commands or a text editor modifying the CSV files.

integrity.description: The agent must actually calculate and apply the price adjustments rather than copying pre-computed answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent using a calculator, spreadsheet software, a Python script, or the Copper POS interface to calculate the new prices.

integrity.description: The agent should not simply rename or copy the original CSV without making the required price changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final 'clearance_inventory.csv' must contain the updated prices, not the original prices from 'clothing_inventory.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The inventory contains 20 items. 8 items have a quantity >= 30 and require a 20% discount: Floral White Top ($75->60), Striped Silk Blouse ($50->40), Dark Denim Top ($60->48), Navy Sports Jacket ($60->48), Soft Winter Jacket ($50->40), Black Leather Bag ($30->24), Zipped Jacket ($65->52), LED High Tops ($80->64). 3 items have a quantity <= 7 and require a 15% markup: Ocean Blue Shirt ($50->57.50), Silk Summer Top ($70->80.50), Striped Skirt and Top ($50->57.50). The final file must be exported to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\clearance_inventory.csv.
